title: Category:Marcel Duchamp
text: Marcel Duchamp, February 1927 [1] Marcel Duchamp , (July 28, 1887 – October 02, 1968) was a French American artist, painter, sculptor, chess player, and chess writer whose work in art is associated with Cubism , conceptual art , and Dadaism . Publications [ edit ] Vitaly Halberstadt , Marcel Duchamp ( 1932 ). L'opposition et les cases conjuguées sont réconciliées .
